section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's Thompson test was negative.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A Thompson test is a clinician-performed physical exam maneuver and its result is an observed finding, not a patient-reported symptom.

section_miscategorizations.text: He will be advised to stop training for one to two weeks to allow for healing.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a management recommendation and part of the treatment plan, not an assessment or diagnostic impression.

section_miscategorizations.text: Physical therapy is ordered to address strength and stretching.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Ordering physical therapy is an explicit management action and belongs in the plan section.
